changes.after: Search and Discover Hugging Face Product and Library documentation. Send an empty query to discover structure and navigation instructions. Knowledge up-to-date as at 25 June 2026. Combine with the Product filter to focus results.
changes.before: Search and Discover Hugging Face Product and Library documentation. Send an empty query to discover structure and navigation instructions. Knowledge up-to-date as at 19 June 2026. Combine with the Product filter to focus results.

changes.notes: Only the date stamp changed from 19 June 2026 to 25 June 2026 in the tool's description; no behavior or schema changes.
